grounding_checkpoint_required: Navigate to https://lepios-one.vercel.app/batches — page loads, shows 'No open batches'.
Create a new batch named 'Test Batch'.
Go to /scan, scan a book, list it via 'List on Amazon', click 'Add to Batch' → select 'Test Batch' → confirm 'Added to Test Batch'.
Navigate to /batches → click 'Test Batch' → item shows with status 'listed' and SKU.
SELECT * FROM fba_batch_items WHERE batch_id = '<test batch id>' — expect 1 row.
BLOCKER: AMAZON_SELLER_ID must be in Vercel env (value: A2MBPL1EOSSBIE from .env.local) before 'List on Amazon' works.
